title: Google's Year In Search: Mikey Madison, Justin Baldoni & 'The Hunting Wives' Land On 2025 Trend Report
text: Google released its annual Year in Search trend report, highlighting the most-searched entertainment topics throughout 2025. The report functions as a digital time capsule of life in 2025, capturing what captivated audiences online. Top actors globally included Mikey Madison, who topped the list as the most-searched actor globally, followed by Lewis Pullman, Isabela Merced, and Song Ji Woo. Madison's prominence reflects her first-time Oscar win this year. In the U.S., Pedro Pascal led searches, with Malachi Barton, Walton Goggins, and Pamela Anderson rounding out the top spots. Justin Baldoni also appeared on this list. The Hunting Wives appeared twice on trending lists—under both the Explained category and Books like recommendations, indicating sustained reader interest. The report also tracked trending Korean dramas and music videos, with Taylor Swift's The Fate of Ophelia among the most-searched music videos.
